name: iso-vic-sprites
_viceNote: VICE-arbitrated. RFL vs VICE x64SC source (viciisc/vicii-cycle.c:590 prefetch_cycles=3+1 + mainc64cpu.c check_ba:194-208 / maincpu_steal_cycles): the VIC sprite-DMA prefetch logic is identical across VICE/TS/TRX64; the 1-cycle is the CPU-side sprite-DMA BA-steal (the SC-core 'STORE write is never check_ba'd' detail — this program's STA $D015/$D001/$D003/$D011). TRX64's c64_6510core.rs is a verbatim 1:1 port of mainc64cpu.c -> 25000 = VICE-correct; TS's Cpu65xxVice records 25001 = 1 cycle off VICE. The golden is TS-recorded (gitignored) so it holds 25001; this viceOverride corrects the expected to VICE-truth (25000) at compare-time so a golden re-record cannot silently revert it. Principle: where TS != VICE, stay VICE-correct, don't degrade TRX64.
